title: OJTracker System
description: This is a system for tracking and managing OJT trainees. It keeps tabs on who shows up for their training.

title: Trove System
description: This is a tool to track and manage the funds of school clubs and organizations. Make it easy for students to pay their due or fees.

title: Flood Monitoring and Early Warning System (with IoT)
description: This is a system for monitoring and warning about floods using IoT technologies.
